name: task-ESE-0016
title: Add Storybook to project. One story per ticket, matching ticket nesting structure
description: Add Storybook to the project as the demo catalogue. Update the agile process so that each ticket's demo produces at least one Storybook story. Stories should mirror the ticket nesting structure (parent ticket = story group, subtasks = individual stories). This replaces the ad-hoc demo artifact capture with a persistent, browsable demo catalogue.
